queries: site:huggingface.co/papers ("Code Generation" OR "Code Writer" OR "Code Completion") AND ("Generative AI" OR "Generative Artificial Intelligence" OR "Generative Model*" OR "Large Language Model*" OR "Language Model*" OR "Small Language Model*" OR "LLM*" OR "RAG" OR "Retrieval Augmented Generation" OR "Natural Language Processing" OR "NLP" OR "AI Agent" OR "AI Multi-Agent") AND ("Application" OR "Technolog*" OR "Approach*" OR "Method*" OR "Tool*" OR "Framework*" OR "Solution*" OR "Strateg*" OR "Model*" OR "System*" OR "Platform*" OR "Technique*") AND ("Software Engineering")
